# Freelabz

> Freelabz is a French offensive-cybersecurity company. We secure digital assets through expert security audits and penetration testing (pentest), guide organizations through their Cloud transition and DevOps/DevSecOps processes, and build open-source security tools such as Secator and the Secator Cloud platform. Our motto: the best defense is a good offense.

## Services

- Audit de surface d'attaque externe (external attack surface audit): asset discovery (subdomains, services, websites), OSINT, initial vulnerability analysis.
- Audit de code (SAST/DAST): static, dynamic and AI-assisted source-code security analysis, optional CI/CD integration.
- Audit d'application (web/mobile): in-depth web (API, routes, fuzzing) and mobile (traffic interception) assessments, blackbox or whitebox.
- Test d'intrusion / Penetration testing (pentest): real-world attack simulation to assess system resilience and identify intrusion paths.
- Phishing: social-engineering simulation to assess employee resistance.
- Abonnement annuel proactif (proactive annual subscription): initial pentest, recurring monthly scans, monitoring and remediation management.
- Accompagnement DevOps: CI/CD pipelines, security integration into deployment (DevSecOps), automation.
- Accompagnement Cloud: cloud strategy, architecture, setup and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Ansible) with a security focus.
- Formations: practical training in cybersecurity, DevOps, programming (Python, Go) and Linux & network administration.

## Products

- [Secator](https://github.com/freelabz/secator): open-source pentest CLI that orchestrates security tools and automates recon/scan workflows via configurable YAML files.
- Secator Cloud: configurable offensive-security SaaS platform for running custom scans, managing pentest missions, AI-assisted data analysis and reporting. Self-hosted option available.

## Company

- Legal name: Freelabz SAS (French simplified joint-stock company)
- SIREN: 990 919 359 · VAT: FR59990919359
- Registered office: 29 Avenue Denfert-Rochereau, 42000 Saint-Étienne, France
- Founded: 29 August 2025
- Founders: Olivier Cervello (President), Wally Chaibi (Managing Director)
